title: Baseline Parity Document
description: Create the Parity Baseline document mapping current status across axes (Streaming, Telemetry, Memory, MCP/Tools, UI, Security, Governance).

title: Inventory parity gaps by axis
description: Structured inventory of gaps per parity axis with impact and initial approach.

title: Canonical interface definitions
description: Draft interface definitions for: Streaming, Telemetry, Memory, MCP/Tools, and UI surfaces.

title: Phase 0 gating criteria
description: Explicit pass/fail criteria and gate process for Phase 0 completion.

title: Phase 0 Runbook
description: Step-by-step runbook to reproduce Phase 0 and gate Phase 1.

title: Parity Scorecard skeleton
description: Skeleton parity scorecard to be filled per axis after Phase 0.

title: Phase 0 kickoff invite
description: Schedule kickoff, publish agenda, and record minutes.

title: Crosswalk kickoff brief
description: Prepare guide to fill crosswalk templates and allocate axis owners.
